name: Angel of Blue Tears
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>涙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>なみだ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; its controller's opponent takes damage equal to the number of cards in their hand x 200, then negate that target's effects until the end of this turn. If effect damage is inflicted (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 Normal Trap directly from your hand or Deck. If Set from the hand, it can be activated this turn. You can only use 1 "Angel of Blue Tears" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; its controller's opponent takes damage equal to the number of cards in their hand x 200, then negate that target's effects until the end of this turn. If effect damage is inflicted (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 Normal Trap directly from your hand or Deck. If Set from the hand, it can be activated this turn. You can only use 1 "Angel of Blue Tears" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Activates if you take effect damage
Activates if your opponent takes effect damage
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
